docs.title: KhayrEats QA guides
docs.text:
Welcome. Use the tabs above to navigate between the two testing guides.

Guide Who it's for Customer app Testers checking the customer-facing app Restaurant app Testers checking the restaurant partner app

Report any issues to the KhayrEats team.

docs.title: Customer app QA guide
docs.text:
App version: v1.1.1+29

Quick checklist for testing the KhayrEats customer app. Work through each section and tick off items as you go.

docs.title: 1. Sign up / login
docs.text:
• [ ] Open app and confirm entry screen appears
  • [ ] Sign up with valid details
  • [ ] Ensure email verification triggers
  • [ ] Login with verified account
  • [ ] Test invalid email / password cases
  • [ ] Test forgot password flow

docs.title: 2. Location
docs.text:
• [ ] Grant location permissions
  • [ ] Confirm map loads and current location is shown
  • [ ] Search for a pickup location and save it
  • [ ] Verify KhayrBoxes update for the selected location

docs.title: 3. Browse KhayrBoxes
docs.text:
• [ ] View available boxes for today and tomorrow
  • [ ] Scroll through the feed
  • [ ] Search for boxes
  • [ ] Open a box detail page
  • [ ] Confirm details, restaurant info, price, and images

docs.title: 4. Order / checkout
docs.text:
• [ ] Start order from box detail page
  • [ ] Verify checkout summary and pickup time
  • [ ] Complete payment with a valid method
  • [ ] Confirm order success message
  • [ ] Check the order appears in history

docs.title: 5. Order tracking
docs.text:
• [ ] Open the orders tab
  • [ ] View current and past orders
  • [ ] Open an active order and confirm tracking details
  • [ ] Check order status updates
  • [ ] Test cancellation flow if available

docs.title: 6. Profile & settings
docs.text:
• [ ] Open profile page
  • [ ] Update profile info and save
  • [ ] Change password successfully
  • [ ] Test account deletion flow if present

docs.title: 7. Feedback
docs.text:
• [ ] Find the feedback screen
  • [ ] Submit a rating / comment
  • [ ] Confirm submission success

docs.title: 8. Navigation / UI
docs.text:
• [ ] Use bottom navigation tabs
  • [ ] Confirm the active tab highlights correctly
  • [ ] Check that back navigation works
  • [ ] Verify UI looks good on both phone and tablet sizes

docs.title: Release checklist
docs.text:
• [ ] Sign up / login works
  • [ ] Location and map work
  • [ ] Browsing and details work
  • [ ] Checkout and payment work
  • [ ] Order history and tracking work
  • [ ] Profile settings work
  • [ ] Feedback submission works
  • [ ] App is usable on different screen sizes

docs.title: Restaurant app QA guide
docs.text:
App version: v1.1.1+29

Testing guide for the KhayrEats restaurant app. Work through each section in order for a full sign-up to order flow test.

docs.title: Step 1: account creation
docs.text:
• [ ] Enter restaurant name, email, phone, password
  • [ ] Password confirmation matches
  • [ ] "Next" button works → goes to step 2

docs.title: Step 2: business details
docs.text:
• [ ] Enter IBAN (bank account)
  • [ ] Enter commercial registration number
  • [ ] Select food category from dropdown
  • [ ] "Next" button works → goes to step 3

docs.title: Step 3: logo & terms
docs.text:
• [ ] Upload restaurant logo (image picker works)
  • [ ] Check "I agree to terms" checkbox
  • [ ] "Create Account" button works → goes to location setup

docs.title: Step 4: location setup
docs.text:
• [ ] Google Maps loads
  • [ ] Search for address or select on map
  • [ ] Confirm location → goes to waiting page

docs.title: Step 5: waiting for approval
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows "pending approval" message
  • [ ] Can't access dashboard until admin approves

docs.title: 2. Login & authentication
docs.text:
• [ ] Valid email / password → goes to dashboard
  • [ ] Wrong credentials → shows error
  • [ ] Customer account → redirected to customer app
  • [ ] Pending restaurant → stays on waiting page
  • [ ] Suspended restaurant → shows suspension message

docs.title: 3. Dashboard
docs.text:
• [ ] Loads for approved restaurants only
  • [ ] Shows restaurant name and logo
  • [ ] Bottom navigation: Dashboard | Orders | Profile
  • [ ] Quick links to manage orders and boxes

docs.title: Active orders
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows list of pending orders
  • [ ] Each order shows: customer name, phone, box name, price, pickup time
  • [ ] Tap order → goes to details page
  • [ ] "Mark as Picked Up" button works
  • [ ] After marking → order moves to past orders

docs.title: Past orders
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows completed orders
  • [ ] Same info as active orders
  • [ ] Historical data loads correctly

docs.title: Order details page
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows full order info
  • [ ] Customer phone number is clickable to call
  • [ ] "Mark as Picked Up" → confirmation dialog appears
  • [ ] Confirm → status changes to completed

docs.title: View all boxes
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows list of restaurant's boxes
  • [ ] Each box shows: title, description, image, pickup times, status, price
  • [ ] "Create New Box" button → starts creation flow

docs.title: Create new box
docs.text:
Step 1: size

  • [ ] Choose Small / Medium / Large
  • [ ] "Next" → goes to step 2

Step 2: description

  • [ ] Enter title and description
  • [ ] Upload image
  • [ ] "Next" → goes to step 3

Step 3: schedule

  • [ ] Select days of week (Sun–Sat)
  • [ ] Set pickup start / end times
  • [ ] Set max daily boxes
  • [ ] "Next" → goes to step 4

Step 4: review

  • [ ] Shows all entered info
  • [ ] "Publish" → creates box
  • [ ] Box appears in list as "Active"

docs.title: Edit box
docs.text:
• [ ] "Edit" button on box card
  • [ ] Same 4-step flow with pre-filled data
  • [ ] Save changes → updates box

docs.title: Deactivate box
docs.text:
• [ ] "Deactivate" button → confirmation dialog appears
  • [ ] Confirm → box becomes inactive
  • [ ] Removed from active list

docs.title: View profile
docs.text:
• [ ] Shows: name, logo, email, phone, IBAN (masked), category
  • [ ] Account status shows correctly (Approved / Pending / Suspended)

docs.title: Edit profile
docs.text:
• [ ] "Edit Profile" button works
  • [ ] Can update any field (name, email, phone, etc.)
  • [ ] Can change logo
  • [ ] Save → updates profile

docs.title: Other features
docs.text:
• [ ] "Manage Khayr Boxes" link → goes to box management
  • [ ] Language selector (EN / AR) works
  • [ ] Logout button → goes to login

docs.title: 7. Error scenarios
docs.text:
• [ ] Invalid email format → validation error shown
  • [ ] Passwords don't match → error message shown
  • [ ] Image upload fails → retry option appears
  • [ ] Try to access dashboard when pending → blocked
  • [ ] Mark order picked up twice → no crash
  • [ ] Create box with missing required fields → validation triggered

docs.title: 8. Integration checks
docs.text:
• [ ] Orders from customers appear in restaurant app
  • [ ] Profile changes save to database
  • [ ] Images upload to Firebase correctly

docs.title: Release checklist
docs.text:
• [ ] Sign-up flow works end to end
  • [ ] Login and authentication work
  • [ ] Dashboard loads correctly
  • [ ] Orders can be viewed and marked as picked up
  • [ ] KhayrBoxes can be created, edited, and deactivated
  • [ ] Profile can be viewed and updated
  • [ ] Error states are handled gracefully
  • [ ] Integration with customer app and database works

Last updated: April 2026
